description: Relationship types for cross-references, inheritance, applicability, and exceptions.

entries.label: Inherits uses
entries.description: The source zone or provision inherits permitted, accessory, secondary, conditional, or prohibited uses from the target zone or provision.

entries.label: Inherits regulations
entries.description: The source zone or provision inherits dimensional standards, requirements, or regulation groups from the target zone or provision.

entries.label: References section
entries.description: The source item references another section.

entries.label: References clause
entries.description: The source item references another clause.

entries.label: References table
entries.description: The source item references a table.

entries.label: References definition
entries.description: The source item references a defined term or definition entry.

entries.label: References zone
entries.description: The source item references another zone without explicit inheritance.

entries.label: References map layer
entries.description: The source item references a map, schedule, mapped feature, or spatial layer.

entries.label: Applies to parcel
entries.description: The source item applies to a parcel, PID, civic address, lot, or site-specific geography.

entries.label: Supersedes
entries.description: The source item replaces, repeals, or supersedes the target item.

entries.label: Exception to
entries.description: The source item creates an exception to the target item.

entries.label: Modifies
entries.description: The source item modifies, qualifies, or conditions the target item.

entries.label: Implements
entries.description: The source item implements a plan, schedule, agreement, policy, or other target item.

entries.label: Unknown
entries.description: The relationship type has not yet been classified.
